title: Xtra Crispy German Pork Dumplings
description: A traditional German dish featuring charred and chewy pork dumplings, deep-fried to a crispy perfection, served as a hangover cure.
instructions: Combine ground pork, whole milk, chopped onion, minced garlic, gluten-free flour, egg, salt, and black pepper in a large mixing bowl.
Mix all the ingredients together until just combined, being careful not to overmix.
Cover the mixture and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes to allow the flavors to meld.
Heat the vegetable oil in a deep frying pan to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
Using wet hands, shape the pork mixture into small dumplings, about 1 1/2 inches in diameter.
Carefully add the dumplings to the hot oil and fry until they are golden brown and crispy, about 5 minutes on each side.
Remove the dumplings from the oil with a slotted spoon and place them on a paper towel-lined plate to drain excess oil.
Serve the dumplings hot and enjoy.
